raw: Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are admitted free. THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children 6 and under are admitted free
